description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine three_wnd_winding_data_5, and is implemented by a call to three_wnd_winding_data_5. Use this API to modify the data of one winding of an existing three-winding transformer in the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Non-Transformer Branch Data). This API routine was first introduced in release 34.0.0. ierr, realaro = three_wnd_winding_data_4(ibus, jbus, kbus, ckt, warg, intgar, realari, ratings)
python_syntax: ierr, realaro = three_wnd_winding_data_4(ibus, jbus, kbus, ckt, warg, intgar, realari, ratings)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus number of one of the buses. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: Bus number one of the other buses. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: kbus
parameters.description: Bus number of the third bus. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: warg
parameters.description: Winding number (1, 2 or 3). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: realari
parameters.description: An array of ten elements specifying corresponding to values REALAR(1) through REALAR(10) as described above. (input).

return_values.name: realaro
return_values.description: An array of four elements specifying corresponding to values REALAR(11) through REALAR(14) as described above. (output).

intgar.description: NTPi, number of tap positions (33 by default).
TABi, impedance correction table number (0 by default).
CONTi, controlled bus number (0 by default).
SICODi, negative for controlled bus on winding bus side (1 by default).
CODi, adjustment control mode flag (-3 through +3, -5 or 5) (0 by default).

realari.description: WINDVi, winding ratio or voltage (1.0 by default if CW of this transformer is 1 or 3; base voltage of the winding bus by default if CW is 2).
NOMVi, winding nominal voltage (0.0 by default).
i, winding phase shift angle (0.0 by default).
RMAi, winding ratio/angle high limit (1.1 by default).
RMIi, winding ratio/angle low limit (0.9 by default).
VMAi, winding voltage or flow upper limit (1.1 by default).
VMIi, winding voltage or flow lower limit (0.9 by default).
CRi, winding load drop compensating resistance (0.0 by default).
CXi, winding load drop compensating reactance (0.0 by default).
CNXAi, winding connection angle (0.0 by default). Used with adjustment control mode 5 (unsymmetric phase shift control of active power) implemented in PSSE version 32.1).

ratings.description: RATE1i, winding rating set 1 line rating (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rate1’.
RATE2i, winding rating set 2 line rating (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rate2’.
RATE3i, winding rating set 3 line rating (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rate3’.
RATE4i, winding rating set 4 line rating (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rate4’.
RATE5i, winding rating set 5 line rating (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rate5’.
RATE6i, winding rating set 6 line rating (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rate6’.
RATE7i, winding rating set 7 line rating (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rate7’.
RATE8i, winding rating set 8 line rating (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rate8’.
RATE9i, winding rating set 9 line rating (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rate9’.
RATE10i, winding rating set 10 line rating (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rate10’.
RATE11i, winding rating set 11 line rating (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rate11’.
RATE12i, winding rating set 12 line rating (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rate12’.

error_codes.description: circuit identifier is more than two characters.
invalid CW, CZ and/or CM value.
CW and/or CZ >1 but no base voltage at winding bus.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - Controlled bus not found. - Invalid adjustment control mode flag. - Any two-winding transformer warnings.
